response.overview: Follow the story of joy and sorrow that tells the tale of sacrifice of an older brother named Afiq who takes care of his special younger brother, Irfan who is deaf and mute following the death of their parents. Irfan and Afiq communicate with each other and those around them using Sign Language. Afiq works at a café and does part-time work painting and selling paintings to support their lives. Irfan dreams of becoming a famous athlete and is passionate about badminton. Afiq lives in a rented house next to an Indian woman who always cares about Afiq and Irfan. Afiq has accidentally met someone who is looking for a mural painter. Aira also helps Afiq greatly in developing his artistic painting talents.
response.title: Takkan Terlerai (TV1)
